name: HydrogenPro
longBusinessSummary: HydrogenPro ASA engages in designing and delivering green hydrogen technology and systems in Norway, Europe, the United States, and the Asia Pacific. It offers high-pressure alkaline electrolyzers and gas separation units. The company serves synthetic aviation fuel, refinery/decarbonization, power to gas, balancing the grid, steel production, fertilizer/ammonia, and shipping markets. HydrogenPro ASA was incorporated in 2013 and is headquartered in Porsgrunn, Norway.
